## Summary

Describe the problem and the solution.

## Release impact

- [ ] No runtime, API, dependency, configuration, test, or embedded-documentation change
- [ ] Successor release required
- [ ] Breaking public-interface change
- [ ] Security-sensitive
- [ ] Publication-only change

## Validation

List the tests and verification commands run.

## Public/private boundary

- [ ] No secret, customer data, private endpoint, proprietary source, or embargoed
      security information is included.
- [ ] Third-party code, models, data, and assets have declared licenses.
- [ ] Documentation and release notes are updated where required.

## Contributor certification

All commits include a valid DCO `Signed-off-by` line.
